[2018-03-26 02:00] .bky_1556 (bky): Re: The design contest - I concluded y'all were right about double Phospholyzer enabling a degenerate amount of econ-acceleration in a race to buy all the drones. So I merged it with a drone (now costs 5REE for $2 income) to smooth the curve and raise the cap.
[2018-03-26 02:00] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I need to compare it with just Auric without buying it
[2018-03-26 02:01] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So just Auric would be 4->5->6->8
[2018-03-26 02:01] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So this needs to make you up more than +8  or else just Aurics was better
[2018-03-26 02:02] mrguy888: Something like that.
[2018-03-26 02:02] .bky_1556 (bky): Aurics require a continuous energy supply.
[2018-03-26 02:02] mrguy888: 2eee is bad in value if you count energy cost.
[2018-03-26 02:02] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Yea, I'm just using it as a baseline investment
[2018-03-26 02:02] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I am assuming Energy is worth 0.5
[2018-03-26 02:02] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): In my new calculations
[2018-03-26 02:02] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): That I haven't posted yet
[2018-03-26 02:02] mrguy888: That is quite overpriced.
[2018-03-26 02:02] mrguy888: Energy is worth less than 0.5
[2018-03-26 02:03] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): I generally assume .3
[2018-03-26 02:03] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Why isn't Energy worth 2/3?
[2018-03-26 02:03] .bky_1556 (bky): Energy = 0.5 is rarely the case, it's either worth very little (<.1) or it's worth 1+.
[2018-03-26 02:03] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Or cos you can't spend 2 gold on Drone?
[2018-03-26 02:03] mtanzer: you can actually calculate how much energy is worth in the drone+engineer model.  I forget exactly what it came out to but something like 0.3 sounds close
[2018-03-26 02:03] .bky_1556 (bky): I guess 2/3 happens too.
[2018-03-26 02:04] mtanzer: might've been a little higher actually.  maybe I should work it out again
[2018-03-26 02:05] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Eh I guess in that model Drone costs more than 3 cos Energy?
[2018-03-26 02:05] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Which would make Energy more valuable
[2018-03-26 02:05] .bky_1556 (bky): yes, but the model only holds in the buildup stage in 3rd-engineer sets.
[2018-03-26 02:05] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Well I guess that's a useless statement when I was ignoring Energy
[2018-03-26 02:06] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So maybe this unit should just cost EEEEE or something lol
[2018-03-26 02:06] mrguy888: Ignoring Energy while simultaneously using different energy costs to balance your unit. 🤔
[2018-03-26 02:07] .bky_1556 (bky): Ironically, Phospholyzer does provide energy at a cost of 1/2.
[2018-03-26 02:07] mtanzer: it holds any time you're still buying engineers for their energy I guess, but yeah most sets that's just for 3rd engineer
[2018-03-26 02:07] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Four Energy cost still makes it an Odin degeneracy unit with Ebb, cos you prolly will have 3 Engis, so with Ebb click 4 Energy
[2018-03-26 02:07] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): 5 Energy is somewhat harder to get to though
[2018-03-26 02:08] mtanzer: I checked energy is worth 0.56 in that model
[2018-03-26 02:08] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): 5 :Energy:  :NotLikeThis:
[2018-03-26 02:08] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So thoughts on:

Trade Deal (v0.2) (:Energy::Energy::Energy::Energy::Energy:, 1 supply) [spell]  
Effect: construct 3 Auric Impulses and construct 3 Doomed Drones for your opponent.

?
[2018-03-26 02:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): i kind of feel like a unit that can choose between 2 :Energy: or :Gold: should have :Gold: as the start of turn effect, and :Gold: -> :Energy: :Energy: as the click ability, if it doesn't block either way
[2018-03-26 02:09] .bky_1556 (bky): In Electrovore sets, the energy is worth 1 damage marginal (~2.2 gold) but costs 2/3 gold. This is just a way of saying Electrovores  you already have are a good way to use energy.
[2018-03-26 02:09] mtanzer: who's gonna get 5 engineers just to buy that?
[2018-03-26 02:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): well, since it uses the energy, you arent buying drones, so you are likely buying 2 anime
[2018-03-26 02:10] masn6811 (Masne98888): so tl;dr, looks like too forced a combo with lucina
[2018-03-26 02:10] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): If it costs less Energy I feel it makes some sets too degenerate
[2018-03-26 02:10] mrguy888: You can't make a unit that gives you a discount on 3 Aurics and expect anything but degeneracy.
[2018-03-26 02:10] .bky_1556 (bky): And also that you generally don't buy a third engineer for drones while you're also buying 'vores.
[2018-03-26 02:10] mrguy888: Avoiding degen will just make your unit totally worthless.
[2018-03-26 02:10] mtanzer: so far it seems like the purpose of this unit is to allow us to counter degenerate rushes with even more degenerate rushes
[2018-03-26 02:10] masn6811 (Masne98888): well, in this case, it seems like the best (maybe only) use is the degenerate use
[2018-03-26 02:10] Deleted User (Deleted User): what about 7EEE for 3 aurics
[2018-03-26 02:10] .bky_1556 (bky): Mega Auric has potential
[2018-03-26 02:11] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I didn't think much on the purpose of the unit, I just felt like making something similar to Blood Pact but with gold/econ theme :Lul:
[2018-03-26 02:11] Deleted User (Deleted User): I mean 7EEE into giving 10
[2018-03-26 02:11] mtanzer: I think the idea behind it that you're going for is "use it when gold is more valuable to us than the opponent" but the way this game works that almost never happens
[2018-03-26 02:11] .bky_1556 (bky): not using aurics as a subunit

[2018-03-26 04:59] .jrkirby (jrkirby): Paraxaelon (5 :Green: , 10 supply) 3 :Fragile: 

:Prompt: 

At the start of turn, gain 1 :Fragile: (up to a maximum of 9 :Fragile: )
[2018-03-26 05:01] wilson0862 (Wilson): When would the ability ever be useful?
[2018-03-26 05:04] .jrkirby (jrkirby): You mean start of turn? If you keep it around for a while, you can get big absorb like xaetron. You can also use it to get value while overdefending fake damage or freeze.
[2018-03-26 05:05] .bky_1556 (bky): You can use it like a soak-wall, or a soak-Infusion.
[2018-03-26 05:05] kaelii: With 8 out you effectively have an absorb 8 dork.
[2018-03-26 05:06] .bky_1556 (bky): I don't really see it sticking around too long. Bubble Screen needed the +gold addition to be worth absorbing with.
[2018-03-26 05:06] masn6811 (Masne98888): i like how you can choose between wall or infusion grid here
[2018-03-26 05:06] kaelii: On the other hand you've spent 40 and 8 :Green:
[2018-03-26 05:06] masn6811 (Masne98888): but heading off to sleep now. nite!
[2018-03-26 05:07] kaelii: But more valuable is probably just 1-4 of them along with your wall/matrix.
[2018-03-26 05:07] wilson0862 (Wilson): I guess I could see buying one against that damage?
[2018-03-26 05:08] wilson0862 (Wilson): Other than that, I don't see keeping one for 6 turns.
[2018-03-26 05:08] kaelii: Being able to absorb 8 damage on a couple of turns and otherwise absorbing for 4 seems pretty good.
[2018-03-26 05:08] wilson0862 (Wilson): Build time 6, one time absorb for 8.
[2018-03-26 05:09] .jrkirby (jrkirby): It may be that a  4 HP design with 2 gain per turn makes for more interesting decisions
[2018-03-26 05:09] wilson0862 (Wilson): One heal a turn is just too slow imo.
[2018-03-26 05:10] kaelii: 1 Heal a turn is really slow but can be offset by 10 supply. If it heals more per turn I'd suggest dropping supply otherwise it is REALLY good at tanking damage.
[2018-03-26 05:10] wilson0862 (Wilson): Unless I'm just missing a bunch of scenarios other than against threat where it sticks around unused for multiple turns.
[2018-03-26 05:10] wilson0862 (Wilson): Are you really buying 6 of these to absorb for 8?
[2018-03-26 05:10] kaelii: Even sneaking in one seems decent.
[2018-03-26 05:11] wilson0862 (Wilson): Keep in mind none of them can take damage either if that's what you want.
[2018-03-26 05:11] .bky_1556 (bky): So the main issue here is that this doesn't actually get extra absorb from blocking while larger.
[2018-03-26 05:11] .bky_1556 (bky): You get fixed absorb value - a 1 HP Paraxaelon - and variable soak.
[2018-03-26 05:11] wilson0862 (Wilson): I do think it's good soak which is the problem. That doesn't use its ability.
[2018-03-26 05:12] kaelii: Well like you can switch between Xaetron and grid for extra absorb.
[2018-03-26 05:12] wilson0862 (Wilson): Except xaetron heals 4.
[2018-03-26 05:12] kaelii: I feel like one gets snuck in early on in natural conduit setups to eat the first attack or two.
[2018-03-26 05:12] wilson0862 (Wilson): You get to absorb on this every six turns
[2018-03-26 05:13] kaelii: And then you get an actual wall/absorber and it builds up health in the mean time
[2018-03-26 05:13] .bky_1556 (bky): However, the inflation-cost of clicking it increases by size, while the soak gain for clicking it remains constant.
[2018-03-26 05:13] kaelii: Until you need to use most/all the health at once.
[2018-03-26 05:13] .bky_1556 (bky): So without an additional benefit for clicking it, like Bubble Screen's gold gain, it's seldom correct to keep absorbing on it at a larger size than 4-5.
[2018-03-26 05:14] .bky_1556 (bky): Or for that matter, to put off soaking with it past 5.
[2018-03-26 05:15] wilson0862 (Wilson): I'm not getting natural conduit to buy this unit early.
[2018-03-26 05:15] .bky_1556 (bky): I went through all of this looking at 20 failed versions of Bubble Screen until I arrived at the "subsume a drone but let it keep clicking for gold" version.
[2018-03-26 05:16] .bky_1556 (bky): That was the only one I found where keeping it for 3 turns to soak was worthwhile without being dominant.
